generated_answers.question: Count premium customers by country from customers.
generated_answers.code:
customers = pl.read_csv("/app/data/customers.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

result = (
    customers
    .filter(pl.col("is_premium"))
    .group_by("country")
    .agg(pl.len().alias("premium_customers"))
    .sort("premium_customers", descending=True)
)

generated_answers.question: Compute total revenue and average discount_amount for completed orders grouped by channel from orders.

    products

generated_answers.question: Count events grouped by event_type and device from events.
Compute total quantity and gross sales per product_id from order_items where gross_sales = quantity * unit_price.
For each customer segment, compute completed order count, total revenue, and average order amount using customers and orders.
generated_answers.code:
customers = pl.read_csv("/app/data/customers.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
orders = pl.read_csv("/app/data/orders.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

result = (
    orders
    .filter(pl.col("status") == "completed")
    .join(customers, on="customer_id", how="inner")
    .group_by("segment")
    .agg(
        pl.len().alias("completed_order_count"),
        pl.col("amount").sum().alias("total_revenue"),
        pl.col("amount").mean().alias("avg_order_amount"),
    )
)

generated_answers.question: Compute net sales by category using order_items and products where net_sales = quantity * unit_price - item_discount.
generated_answers.code:
order_items = pl.read_csv("/app/data/order_items.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
products = pl.read_csv("/app/data/products.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

result = (
    order_items
    .join(products.select(["product_id", "category"]), on="product_id", how="inner")
    .with_columns((pl.col("quantity") * pl.col("unit_price") - pl.col("item_discount")).alias("net_sales"))
    .group_by("category")
    .agg(pl.col("net_sales").sum().alias("net_sales"))
)

generated_answers.question: Compute average number of sessions per customer grouped by is_premium using customers and events.
generated_answers.code:
customers = pl.read_csv("/app/data/customers.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
events = pl.read_csv("/app/data/events.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

sessions_per_customer = (
    events
    .group_by("customer_id")
    .agg(pl.col("session_id").n_unique().alias("session_count"))
)

result = (
    customers
    .join(sessions_per_customer, on="customer_id", how="inner")
    .group_by("is_premium")
    .agg(pl.col("session_count").mean().alias("avg_sessions_per_customer"))
)

generated_answers.question: Compute daily revenue for completed orders and a 7-day rolling average from orders.
generated_answers.code:
orders = pl.read_csv("/app/data/orders.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

daily = (
    orders
    .filter(pl.col("status") == "completed")
    .with_columns(pl.col("order_date").dt.date().alias("day"))
    .group_by("day")
    .agg(pl.col("amount").sum().alias("daily_revenue"))
    .sort("day")
)

result = daily.with_columns(
    pl.col("daily_revenue").rolling_mean(window_size=7).alias("rolling_7d_avg_revenue")
)

generated_answers.question: Find top 20 customers by lifetime_value with at least 5 completed orders using customers and orders.
generated_answers.code:
customers = pl.read_csv("/app/data/customers.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
orders = pl.read_csv("/app/data/orders.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

qualified = (
    orders
    .filter(pl.col("status") == "completed")
    .group_by("customer_id")
    .agg(pl.len().alias("completed_order_count"))
    .filter(pl.col("completed_order_count") >= 5)
)

result = (
    qualified
    .join(customers.select(["customer_id", "lifetime_value"]), on="customer_id", how="inner")
    .sort("lifetime_value", descending=True)
    .head(20)
)

generated_answers.question: Compute brand share of quantity sold within each category using products and order_items.
generated_answers.code:
products = pl.read_csv("/app/data/products.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
order_items = pl.read_csv("/app/data/order_items.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

brand_qty = (
    order_items
    .join(products.select(["product_id", "category", "brand"]), on="product_id", how="inner")
    .group_by(["category", "brand"])
    .agg(pl.col("quantity").sum().alias("brand_quantity"))
)

category_qty = (
    brand_qty
    .group_by("category")
    .agg(pl.col("brand_quantity").sum().alias("category_quantity"))
)

result = (
    brand_qty
    .join(category_qty, on="category", how="inner")
    .with_columns(
        (pl.col("brand_quantity") / pl.col("category_quantity")).alias("brand_share")
    )
)

generated_answers.question: Compute time difference in seconds between consecutive events per customer from events.
Compute conversion rate per country as customers with completed orders divided by customers with events using customers, orders, and events.
generated_answers.code:
customers = pl.read_csv("/app/data/customers.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
orders = pl.read_csv("/app/data/orders.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
events = pl.read_csv("/app/data/events.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

customers_with_orders = (
    orders
    .filter(pl.col("status") == "completed")
    .select("customer_id")
    .unique()
    .join(customers.select(["customer_id", "country"]), on="customer_id", how="inner")
    .group_by("country")
    .agg(pl.len().alias("customers_with_completed_orders"))
)

customers_with_events = (
    events
    .select("customer_id")
    .unique()
    .join(customers.select(["customer_id", "country"]), on="customer_id", how="inner")
    .group_by("country")
    .agg(pl.len().alias("customers_with_events"))
)

result = (
    customers_with_orders
    .join(customers_with_events, on="country", how="inner")
    .with_columns(
        (
            pl.col("customers_with_completed_orders") / pl.col("customers_with_events")
        ).alias("conversion_rate")
    )
)

generated_answers.question: Find top 3 products by net sales within each category using products and order_items.
generated_answers.code:
products = pl.read_csv("/app/data/products.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
order_items = pl.read_csv("/app/data/order_items.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

sales = (
    order_items
    .join(products.select(["product_id", "category"]), on="product_id", how="inner")
    .with_columns((pl.col("quantity") * pl.col("unit_price") - pl.col("item_discount")).alias("net_sales"))
    .group_by(["category", "product_id"])
    .agg(pl.col("net_sales").sum().alias("net_sales"))
)

result = (
    sales
    .with_columns(
        pl.col("net_sales").rank("dense", descending=True).over("category").alias("rank_in_category")
    )
    .filter(pl.col("rank_in_category") <= 3)
    .sort(["category", "rank_in_category", "product_id"])
)

generated_answers.question: Compute median order amount and 90th percentile payment_delay_days per segment and month using customers and orders.
generated_answers.code:
customers = pl.read_csv("/app/data/customers.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
orders = pl.read_csv("/app/data/orders.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

result = (
    orders
    .join(customers.select(["customer_id", "segment"]), on="customer_id", how="inner")
    .with_columns(pl.col("order_date").dt.truncate("1mo").alias("month"))
    .group_by(["segment", "month"])
    .agg(
        pl.col("amount").median().alias("median_order_amount"),
        pl.col("payment_delay_days").quantile(0.9).alias("p90_payment_delay_days"),
    )
)

rows.question: For each customer segment, compute completed order count, total revenue, and average order amount using customers and orders.
rows.code:
customers = pl.read_csv("/app/data/customers.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
orders = pl.read_csv("/app/data/orders.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

result = (
    orders
    .filter(pl.col("status") == "completed")
    .join(customers, on="customer_id", how="inner")
    .group_by("segment")
    .agg(
        pl.len().alias("completed_order_count"),
        pl.col("amount").sum().alias("total_revenue"),
        pl.col("amount").mean().alias("avg_order_amount"),

)

rows.question: Compute average number of sessions per customer grouped by is_premium using customers and events.
rows.code:
customers = pl.read_csv("/app/data/customers.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
events = pl.read_csv("/app/data/events.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

sessions_per_customer = (
    events
    .group_by("customer_id")
    .agg(pl.col("session_id").n_unique().alias("session_count"))
)

result = (
    customers
    .join(sessions_per_customer, on="customer_id", how="inner")
    .group_by("is_premium")
    .agg(pl.col("session_count").mean().alias("avg_sessions_per_customer"))
)

rows.question: Compute daily revenue for completed orders and a 7-day rolling average from orders.
rows.code:
orders = pl.read_csv("/app/data/orders.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

daily = (
    orders
    .filter(pl.col("status") == "completed")
    .with_columns(pl.col("order_date").dt.date().alias("day"))
    .group_by("day")
    .agg(pl.col("amount").sum().alias("daily_revenue"))
    .sort("day")
)

result = daily.with_columns(
    pl.col("daily_revenue").rolling_mean(window_size=7).alias("rolling_7d_avg_revenue")
)

rows.question: Find top 20 customers by lifetime_value with at least 5 completed orders using customers and orders.
rows.code:
customers = pl.read_csv("/app/data/customers.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
orders = pl.read_csv("/app/data/orders.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

qualified = (
    orders
    .filter(pl.col("status") == "completed")
    .group_by("customer_id")
    .agg(pl.len().alias("completed_order_count"))
    .filter(pl.col("completed_order_count") >= 5)
)

result = (
    qualified
    .join(customers.select(["customer_id", "lifetime_value"]), on="customer_id", how="inner")
    .sort("lifetime_value", descending=True)
    .head(20)
)

rows.question: Compute brand share of quantity sold within each category using products and order_items.
rows.code:
products = pl.read_csv("/app/data/products.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
order_items = pl.read_csv("/app/data/order_items.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

brand_qty = (
    order_items
    .join(products.select(["product_id", "category", "brand"]), on="product_id", how="inner")
    .group_by(["category", "brand"])
    .agg(pl.col("quantity").sum().alias("brand_quantity"))
)

category_qty = (
    brand_qty
    .group_by("category")
    .agg(pl.col("brand_quantity").sum().alias("category_quantity"))
)

result = (
    brand_qty
    .join(category_qty, on="category", how="inner")
    .with_columns(
        (pl.col("brand_quantity") / pl.col("category_quantity")).alias("brand_share")
    )
)

rows.question: Compute conversion rate per country as customers with completed orders divided by customers with events using customers, orders, and events.
rows.code:
customers = pl.read_csv("/app/data/customers.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
orders = pl.read_csv("/app/data/orders.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
events = pl.read_csv("/app/data/events.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

customers_with_orders = (
    orders
    .filter(pl.col("status") == "completed")
    .select("customer_id")
    .unique()
    .join(customers.select(["customer_id", "country"]), on="customer_id", how="inner")
    .group_by("country")
    .agg(pl.len().alias("customers_with_completed_orders"))
)

customers_with_events = (
    events
    .select("customer_id")
    .unique()
    .join(customers.select(["customer_id", "country"]), on="customer_id", how="inner")
    .group_by("country")
    .agg(pl.len().alias("customers_with_events"))
)

result = (
    customers_with_orders
    .join(customers_with_events, on="country", how="inner")
    .with_columns(
        (
            pl.col("customers_with_completed_orders") / pl.col("customers_with_events")
        ).alias("conversion_rate")
    )
)

rows.question: Find top 3 products by net sales within each category using products and order_items.
rows.code:
products = pl.read_csv("/app/data/products.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
order_items = pl.read_csv("/app/data/order_items.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

sales = (
    order_items
    .join(products.select(["product_id", "category"]), on="product_id", how="inner")
    .with_columns((pl.col("quantity") * pl.col("unit_price") - pl.col("item_discount")).alias("net_sales"))
    .group_by(["category", "product_id"])
    .agg(pl.col("net_sales").sum().alias("net_sales"))
)

result = (
    sales
    .with_columns(
        pl.col("net_sales").rank("dense", descending=True).over("category").alias("rank_in_category")
    )
    .filter(pl.col("rank_in_category") <= 3)
    .sort(["category", "rank_in_category", "product_id"])
)

rows.question: Compute median order amount and 90th percentile payment_delay_days per segment and month using customers and orders.
rows.code:
customers = pl.read_csv("/app/data/customers.csv", try_parse_dates=True)
orders = pl.read_csv("/app/data/orders.csv", try_parse_dates=True)

result = (
    orders
    .join(customers.select(["customer_id", "segment"]), on="customer_id", how="inner")
    .with_columns(pl.col("order_date").dt.truncate("1mo").alias("month"))
    .group_by(["segment", "month"])
    .agg(
        pl.col("amount").median().alias("median_order_amount"),
        pl.col("payment_delay_days").quantile(0.9).alias("p90_payment_delay_days"),
    )
)
